creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 240293
Makefile

With attached Makefile, this ports sort of "attempts" to build for me in Poudriere (see below).

- go.mod manual fetch is needed because this module is not listed on proxy.golang.org (go.mod needs to be in the module root, but it isn't)
- go.mk cannot handle go.mod's that have replace directives referencing local filesystem path, so eventsapi's go.mod is also manually fetched

This gets us to the build stage, which eventually fails with

# github.com/dolthub/go-mysql-server/internal/sockstate
vendor/github.com/dolthub/go-mysql-server/internal/sockstate/sockstate.go:37:16: undefined: tcpSocks

which is likely caused by the lack of awareness of FreeBSD existence in https://github.com/dolthub/go-mysql-server/blob/main/internal/sockstate/netstat_unix.go and probably needs to be reported upstream.
